top_opportunities.reason: 8928 windows show leakage or constant compressed-air flow patterns.
Current estimated energy per door is 1.13 kWh. Pilot target: reduce energy intensity after baseline validation.
979 unplanned windows consume energy without useful production signal. Planned stops are excluded.

findings.title: Compressed-air base load or leakage pattern
findings.recommendation: Run a leakage walkdown on the top affected stations, compare flow during production-off windows, and add shut-off or pressure-zone logic where technically safe.

findings.title: Station hotspot: ST10
findings.recommendation: Use this station as the first on-site validation point. Confirm station state, PLC readiness and safe standby constraints with the responsible automation engineer.

findings.title: Governance and validation requirement
findings.recommendation: Do not treat this as an audit result. Use it to scope a 90-day pilot, validate baseline, confirm constraints and document operator-approved actions.
